/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared  -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/lidar_lib.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,liblidar_lib.so -o liblidar_lib.so CMakeFiles/lidar_lib.dir/Lidar/lidar.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kilabor/isaac-go2-ros2/build/hesai_ros_driver/src/driver/HesaiLidar_SDK_2.0/libhesai:/home/kilabor/miniconda3/envs/env_go2_real/lib: libudpParser_lib.so libptcClient_lib.so libserialClient_lib.so /home/kilabor/miniconda3/envs/env_go2_real/lib/libssl.so /home/kilabor/miniconda3/envs/env_go2_real/lib/libcrypto.so libsource_lib.so libplatutils_lib.so liblog_lib.so
